visuals.title: Happened-Before Relation Example
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Happened-Before Relation Example
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Clocks, Events and Process States</text>

  <!-- Clock -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="40" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <line x1="100" y1="100" x2="130" y2="85" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="100" y1="100" x2="100" y2="70" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="100" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Logical Clock
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Event -->
  <rect x="250" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Event
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="300" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    (Message Send/Receive)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Process States -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="120" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Process States
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Running
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Ready • Blocked
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Clock to Event -->
  <path d="M140 100 L240 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Event to Process States -->
  <path d="M300 110 L250 220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="10" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Connection Labels -->
  <text x="190" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Timestamps
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="275" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Changes State
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

nodes.label:
Increment Local Counter
C_i = C_i + 1
Assign value to event
Include timestamp t = C_i in message

C_i = max(C_i, t_received) + 1
Assign new value to receive event
